title: Farinata
body:
# Farinata in Minecraft!

![Farinata](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/20/Farinata.cotta.jpg/800px-Farinata.cotta.jpg)

**Farinata** or **"Farinata di ceci"** (_chickpea farinata_) is a savoury cake, tipically from Liguria, made with chickpea flour, water and oil.

It's known with many names in many parts of northern and western Italy, and it's usually eaten by itself or as a side/appetizer to pizza.

And now, you can make it in Minecraft!

The mod adds wild chickpea plants, chickpea crops, chickpeas that you can roast for a snack, or turn into flour.
Mix a water bucket and flour to get a batter, that you can then cook to get a Farinata! (the batter is a fluid too lol)

It packs a lot of nutrients, and you can either eat it directly, or place it in the world to share with friends :3

Also integrated with Create :3
